name: Radifi
description_short: RadiFi Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution serving Northeast Florida with competitive loan rates, high-yield savings accounts, and digital banking convenience.
description_long:
RadiFi Credit Union (formerly Jax Federal) has been serving the Jacksonville community for over 60 years as a member-owned, not-for-profit financial cooperative. The credit union operates with NCUA insurance and emphasizes local decision-making and community reinvestment as core values. With a routing number of 263079234, RadiFi positions itself as a neighborhood financial partner dedicated to empowering members with competitive products and services.

RadiFi's service portfolio includes auto loan refinancing (as low as 4.59% APR with rate discounts), home equity loans (as low as 5.75% APR), mortgage products with cash-back incentives ($1,000 on qualifying new home mortgages), and high-yield savings vehicles. Their Make Waves Checking Account offers up to 4.00% APY, and they provide 13-month certificates at 3.75% APY with $2,500 minimum deposits. The credit union also offers business checking and savings accounts, business credit cards and loans, credit cards with introductory rates, and Visa card products. Members can access services through a mobile banking app, online banking portal, and branch locations.

RadiFi distinguishes itself through emphasis on local decision-making, competitive rates designed specifically for member benefit, and community partnerships. They partner with organizations like Jacksonville Waves and Jacksonville University Athletics and highlight reinvestment in Northeast Florida communities. The credit union promotes rapid account opening ("in minutes") and positions itself as member-focused rather than profit-driven, with testimonials from long-term members praising personal relationships with branch management.

As a credit union, RadiFi is fundamentally limited to members meeting field-of-membership requirements (geographic and/or occupational eligibility for Northeast Florida). The website does not clearly disclose these membership requirements or eligibility criteria. While they advertise competitive rates, actual rates depend on creditworthiness and underwriting factors, meaning advertised minimums may not be universally available. Their product offerings are standard for credit unions and may have limitations compared to larger national financial institutions.
services: Auto loan refinancing with rates as low as 4.59% APR
Home equity loans starting at 5.75% APR
Home mortgages with $1,000 cash-back incentive on qualifying purchases
Make Waves Checking Account earning up to 4.00% APY
Visa credit cards with 1.90% introductory APR for 12 months
Business credit cards and business loans
Mobile banking app with digital account management
pros: Auto loan refinancing rates as low as 4.59% APR with additional 0.25% rate discount available
High-yield checking (Make Waves account) offering up to 4.00% APY competitive with online banks
13-month certificate special at 3.75% APY with accessible $2,500 minimum deposit
Local decision-making structure means loan approvals and account matters handled by community-based personnel
Mobile banking app for digital account management and convenience
$1,000 cash-back incentive on qualifying new home mortgages
90-day no-payment period on auto loan refinances (interest accrues but no monthly payments required)
60+ year history serving Jacksonville community with long-term member testimonials
cons: Membership eligibility requirements not clearly disclosed on website—likely geographic or occupational restrictions for Northeast Florida only
Advertised rates are minimums and actual APR depends on creditworthiness, credit score, loan term, LTV, and underwriting factors—not all applicants qualify
Auto loan refinance offers exclude existing RadiFi members and certain vehicle types (model years 2019-2026 only, vehicle mileage affects terms)
Limited geographic footprint compared to national banks—serves only Northeast Florida region
Product selection is standard for credit unions and may lack specialized offerings available at larger institutions
best_for: Northeast Florida residents and employees eligible for membership seeking competitive auto loan refinancing and home equity products
Savers prioritizing high-yield checking and savings certificates with rates competitive to online banks
First-time homebuyers in the Jacksonville area looking for mortgage products with cash-back incentives
Small business owners in Northeast Florida needing business checking, credit cards, and local relationship banking
diagnosis: RadiFi Credit Union is best for Northeast Florida residents and employees who qualify for membership and seek competitive rates on auto refinancing, mortgages, and high-yield savings products backed by local decision-making. The primary caveat is membership eligibility—applicants must meet undisclosed field-of-membership requirements, and advertised rates are minimums subject to credit and underwriting approval, not guaranteed for all borrowers.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
